data.body: INCIDENT+RECOVERY: a 'git stash pop' during the base-check step popped a pre-existing UNRELATED shared stash (wip-mixed, another session's WIP - stashes are shared across worktrees via the common git dir) into my worktree, leaving conflict markers in config.py + 3 other files I never touched (broke rebar import). My 5 commits were intact + already pushed. Fixed with 'git reset --hard HEAD' (restored clean a3caed732); wip-mixed stash PRESERVED (pop had conflicted so it was never dropped). Lesson: avoid 'git stash' in shared-worktree repos. Resuming ticket closes.
